name: Salmon Tempura Roll with Mirin Leeks, Wasabi
recipeIngredient: 4 leek bulbs, julienned with the white parts only
1 tablespoon clarified butter or neutral oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a pan and sauté the julienned leeks until they are tender but not caramelized, maintaining their white color.
2. Deglaze the pan with mirin and reduce all liquid to a glaze.
3. Toss in whole butter and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Place salmon fillets on half of one nori sheet.
5. Lay the cooled leeks over the salmon and roll up tightly.
6. Set aside 1/4 of the leeks for serving on the plate.
7. In a stainless steel bowl, whisk soda water into rice flour until it reaches a paint-like consistency.
8. Heat oil to 375°F (190°C).
9. Dip the rolls in tempura batter and fry until golden brown. The salmon should finish cooking at medium rare or slightly less.
10. Serve with toasted sesame seeds and gari on the side for garnish.
